creator: oberman@es.net
text:
> From: Jung-uk Kim <jkim@FreeBSD.org>
> Date: Thu, 28 Jun 2007 15:05:40 -0400
> 
> I tracked it down and confirmed it is not OpenOffice.org's bug.  
> Basically you it goes like this: OOo -> GTK+ -> Cairo -> 
> libX11. :-(  Luckily these issues are fixed in the latest ports.  So, 
> update your x11/libX11 and graphics/cairo and try again.  It should 
> fix the issue.

Wow! That must have been quite a job to track down. Thanks!

I can confirm that OOo is operating correctly again on 2 of my
systems. I won't be able to check the third until next week, but I feel
pretty sure that it will be OK, too.
-- 
R. Kevin Oberman, Network Engineer
